MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regular calendar this day for settlement conference. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. Defendants appearing in pro per. Parties reached an agreement, terms of settlement on record. Off trial calendar, case settled.
